name: SEO Meta
description: Add custom meta titles, descriptions, and Open Graph tags to posts and pages for better SEO and social sharing.
author: Core 3 CMS

settings.label: Title Suffix
settings.hint: Appended to every page title (e.g. ' — My Blog'). Leave empty for none.
